ValidationRule.description: User should not allowed to Edit the Case record once its closed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), $RecordType.Name = "CONTAINER Service Engineering", ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status),"Closed"), NOT( $Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Case status cannot be changed for a closed case.
